query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName,
  s.customerName, s.customerExternalId, s.discoveryNotes, s.connectionId,
  s.locationAddress, s.monthlyCost
FROM services s
WHERE s.externalId IN ('SVC0040', 'SVC0032', 'SVC0051', 'S0458', 'S0483', 'S0468', 'S0480')
ORDER BY s.externalId;
